title: elaphoglossum cedralense
intro: Elaphoglossum cedralense is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as a type of epiphytic or terrestrial fern native to Mexico. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Research has indicated that Elaphoglossum cedralense may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as fever and respiratory issues, due to its ability to modulate the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used to make tea or tinctures for its medicinal properties.
